parties.name: Phoenix Industries Inc.
parties.evidence_quote: Phoenix Industries Inc., a Texas corporation

parties.name: BlueRiver Consulting Group LLC
parties.evidence_quote: BlueRiver Consulting Group LLC, a California limited liability company

term.evidence_quote: shall commence on the Effective Date and shall continue through September 30, 2026

payment_terms.value: Fixed fee USD $42,000 — three milestones ($10,000 / $16,000 / $16,000), net 30
payment_terms.evidence_quote: fixed fee of forty-two thousand U.S. dollars (USD $42,000), payable as follows: $10,000 upon execution of this SOW; $16,000 upon completion of the Dagster cutover; and $16,000 upon completion of the operational handoff

deliverables.value: (1) Airflow→Dagster pipeline migration with DAG conversions and historical backfill; (2) written runbook; (3) two-week operational handoff
deliverables.evidence_quote: Migration of Client's data pipeline from the legacy Airflow 1.x environment to a managed Dagster deployment, including all DAG conversions and historical-backfill orchestration

ip_ownership.value: Work for hire — all deliverables are exclusive property of Client; backstop assignment for non-WMFH portions
ip_ownership.evidence_quote: shall be considered "work made for hire" and shall be the exclusive property of Client

termination_clause.evidence_quote: Either Party may terminate this SOW upon fourteen (14) days' written notice

governing_law.evidence_quote: laws of the State of California

kill_fee.value: 25% of unbilled fees on Client termination for convenience
kill_fee.evidence_quote: kill fee equal to twenty-five percent (25%) of any unbilled fees remaining under this SOW

limitation_of_liability.value: Capped at total fees paid; no indirect/consequential damages
limitation_of_liability.evidence_quote: aggregate liability arising out of or in connection with this SOW shall not exceed the total fees paid by Client to Provider under this SOW
